## Security Checklist
- [ ] CSRF token in all POST/PUT/DELETE forms
- [ ] SQL queries use parameterized queries (? placeholders)
- [ ] ACL validation before write operations
- [ ] Form input validated
- [ ] Audit trail logged with `log_history()`
- [ ] No PII (passwords, tokens) in code/logs
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets (use environment variables)

## Multi-Client & Isolation
- [ ] Changes respect client isolation
- [ ] `client_id` properly filtered in queries
- [ ] ACL enforced where needed

## Code Quality
- [ ] Follows PEP 8 style guide
- [ ] Code is clear and self-documenting
- [ ] Docstrings added for complex logic
- [ ] No console logs left in code
- [ ] Imports are clean (no wildcards)

## Documentation
- [ ] README updated if needed
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md checked
- [ ] Code comments added for non-obvious logic
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md entry added
